title: World of Expansion
description: A mod that expands on the world of Minecraft in many ways!
body:
# World of Expansion
This mod adds a whole bunch of new content for a excelent vanilla+ experience, like new items, effects, mobs, and more!

## New Ores
### Pladium
Pladium is a new ore that can be commonly found and be be used in many crafting recipes.

<details>
<summary>Pladium Items</summary>

- Pladium Ingot
- Raw Pladium
- Block of Pladium
- Glowing Pladium Block
- Pladium Stairs
- Pladium Slab
- Pladium Button
- Pladium Pressure Plate
- Pladium Fence
- Pladium Fence Gate
- Pladium Wall
- Pladium Saber
- Pladium Warhammer
</details>



## Relics
Relics can be found across the world with many variants that help create new helpful item in your world.
### Current Relics
- Lost Relic [Found in Ancient Cities]
- Burned Relic [Found in Nether Forttresses]
